instruction: The API client in ~/Desktop/url_client/ is building broken URLs when the base URL and endpoint contain leading or trailing slashes. Read ISSUE.md, open the urllib.parse urljoin documentation in Chrome, and use VS Code to repair the implementation so the tests pass. After the fix, create ~/Desktop/url_client/FIX_NOTE.txt containing exactly `url join fixed`.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/url_client')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(base / 'ISSUE.md').write_text('Joining https://api.example.com/v1/ with /users should produce https://api.example.com/v1/users.\n')
(base / 'helpers.py').write_text("""def join_url(base, endpoint):
    return base + endpoint
""")
(base / 'client.py').write_text("""from helpers import join_url

def user_url(base):
    return join_url(base, '/users')
""")
(base / 'test.py').write_text("""from client import user_url

def test():
    assert user_url('https://api.example.com/v1/') == 'https://api.example.com/v1/users'
    assert user_url('https://api.example.com/v1') == 'https://api.example.com/v1/users'
""")
PY
